DefinitionDescription: This term is intended to collate similar measurements for the LOINC SNOMED CT Collaboration in an ontological view. It may NOT be used to report back the measured patient value. [https://lo.inc/ce2mb6]

DefinitionDescription: The ratio of IgG to albumin clearances, the selectivity index, is useful in the diagnosis and management of proteinuria. Both IgG and albumin levels are measured in serum and urine and the selectivity index (SI) is determined where SI = (uIgG/sIgG)/(uAlb/sAlb) or (uIgG/sIgG * sAlb/uAlb).[PMID: 20921302]
